name: Premier White Sugar Cookies
recipeIngredient: 12 oz NESTLE Premier White baking bars (6 oz each)
9 oz (1 1/2 cups) NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate Morsels
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt 3 foil-wrapped Premier White baking bars (6 ounces each). Set aside.
3. In a small bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
4. In a large mixing bowl, beat butter and sugar until creamy. Blend in egg and vanilla extract. Beat in melted baking bars. Gradually beat in flour mixture until soft dough forms.
5. Shape dough into a ball. Flatten to 3/4 inch thickness. Wrap in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 15 minutes until firm.
6. On a lightly floured surface, roll out dough to 1/8 inch thickness. Using 2 1/2-inch to 3-inch cookie cutters, cut the dough into shapes. Place on ungreased cookie sheets.
7. Bake 8-10 minutes or until edges are golden brown. Let stand 2 minutes before removing from cookie sheets and cooling completely.
8. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt remaining 3 foil-wrapped Premier White baking bars (6 ounces each). Spread or pipe the melted bars onto cookies.
9. Decorate with NESTLE Toll House semi-sweet chocolate Morsels, attaching with melted bars.
10. Makes about 3 1/2 dozen cookies.
CHRISTMAS TREE HANGING COOKIES: Before baking, make a 1/2-inch hole near the top edge of each cut-out using a skewer.
